documentId.description: Identifier for the document this request is for.

userId.description: Identifier for the user that made the request.

teamId.description: Identifier for the workspace the request belongs to.

status.description: The current status of the access request.

responderId.description: Identifier for the user that responded to the request, if any.

respondedAt.description: The date and time the request was responded to, if any.

createdAt.description: The date and time that this object was created

updatedAt.description: The date and time that this object was last changed
